---
title: "10. 看不见的东西如何被看见"
subtitle: "How the Unseen Becomes Observable"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 10
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `observation_refinement_reduces_error` across 道德经、易经、黄帝内经、孙子兵法、几何原本 and the Gen 2 papers."
---

## 定理锚点 / Lean Anchors

| 角色 | 定理 |
|---|---|
| 主定理核 | `observation_refinement_reduces_error` |
| 支撑定理 1 | `prefix_resolution_decreases_error` |
| 支撑定理 2 | `maxFiberMultiplicity_bounds` |

## 文本导航 / Classical Works

- [道德经](../tao-te-ching/index.qmd)
- [易经](../i-ching/index.qmd)
- [孙子兵法](../sunzi/index.qmd)
- [黄帝内经](../huangdi-neijing/index.qmd)
- [几何原本](../elements/index.qmd)

## 论文导航 / Gen 2 Papers

- [Folded Histograms of Irrational Rotations: Sampling Certificates and Structural Mismatch to the Parry Measure](../../science/gen2/folded-rotation-histogram-certificates.qmd)
- [Shell Geometry from Stationary Detector Thermality in Static KMS Spacetimes](../../science/gen2/grg-shell-geometry-from-stationary-detector-thermality.qmd)

## 正文 / Essay

{{< include articles/synthesis_10_fiber_scan_observation.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
